properties.titulo_evento: Lawmakers demand Pentagon release findings from probe of Iran school strike
properties.descricao: Lawmakers demanded Monday that the Pentagon release its findings from an investigation into the Feb. 28 strike at a girls’ school in Iran.

properties.descricao: The U.S. military will begin enforcing a maritime blockade on Iran on Tuesday.

properties.titulo_evento: UK to list Iran’s IRGC as ‘terror’ threat
properties.descricao: London debuts new powers targeting state proxies after accusing Iranian outfit of engineering anti-Semitic attacks.

properties.titulo_evento: EU unveils $1bn fund for Gaza war recovery
properties.descricao: The scheme falls critically short of the $71bn reportedly needed for Gaza's recovery over the next 10 years.

properties.descricao: The US Treasury Department posted the new directive on its website on Monday.

properties.descricao: PM Ali al-Zaidi to hold talks with Trump, with energy investment and role of pro-Iran groups likely to dominate agenda.

properties.descricao: Iran rejects any US control over strait as both sides trade attacks in major threat to negotiations to end their war.

properties.descricao: Foreign ministers' meeting comes months after the EU imposed sanctions on Israel over West Bank settlement construction.

properties.descricao: Malcolm Timbrell's wife and their friends are thought to have died when a devastating wildfire tore through their village in Spain.

properties.descricao: Cartel members and ex-colleagues describe how Zhang Zhidong allegedly linked Chinese chemicals to Mexican drug labs.

properties.descricao: Four people were injured after a Russian strike hit Odesa on 13 July 2026, according to Ukraine's State Emergency Service.

properties.titulo_evento: Drone footage shows devastation after deadly Spain wildfire
properties.descricao: Drone footage shows the devastation left by a deadly wildfire in southern Spain that killed at least 12 people and burned around 7,000 hectares. Authorities say the blaze has now been brought under control.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela quake death toll rises to 4,490, officials say, but no number given for missing
properties.descricao: Camps for families left homeless have sprung up in stadiums, plazas and on sidewalks in La Guaira as well as nearby Caracas.

properties.titulo_evento: Spain wildfire: Firefighters gain ground as Almería evacuees return home
properties.descricao: Firefighters gained the upper hand on the deadly Almería wildfire after days of battling the flames, as the blaze that killed 12 people and burned 66 square kilometres began to ease, allowing some of the nearly 1,500 evacuees to return home.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel to hold elections on 27 October in what is seen as referendum on Netanyahu leadership
properties.descricao: Israel will hold national elections on 27 October, the last date allowed by law to hold national elections. The Knesset is set to end its current term on 17 July.

properties.titulo_evento: France: hundreds dive into the Seine for Paris’ first river race in 80 years
properties.descricao: Swimmers plunged into the Seine near the Eiffel Tower for the Open Swim Harmonie Mutuelle, the first major organised race on the river in nearly 80 years.

properties.titulo_evento: Argentina fans erupt as Messi's men reach World Cup semifinal
properties.descricao: Argentina fans celebrate in Buenos Aires after a dramatic 3-1 extra-time win over ten-man Switzerland sends the defending champions into the World Cup semifinals.

properties.titulo_evento: US Senator Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
properties.descricao: Graham, a prominent Republican voice on foreign policy, had recently returned from Ukraine, where he met with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy in Kyiv.

properties.titulo_evento: Gaza Strip: EU conference pledges €900m in donations
properties.descricao: The conference in Brussels was attended by Palestinian representatives. The EU's top diplomat said the bloc's support depends on reforms in the Palestinian Authority.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: Trump reinstates US blockade of Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: President Donald Trump says the US will restart its naval blockade in the Strait of Hormuz, targeting Iranian ships and those doing business with Iran. Follow DW for the latest.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran: Living in limbo between war and ceasefire
properties.descricao: Repeated ceasefire violations, contradictory political signals and ongoing emergency measures have fueled exhaustion, anger and deep uncertainty among many Iranians.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Merz calls for monetary policy dialogue with China
properties.descricao: The German chancellor says the EU cannot win against a competitor that artificially manipulates its currency. Meanwhile, another US national suffering from Ebola has landed in Germany for treatment. Follow DW.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine, 9 countries form ballistic missile defense coalition
properties.descricao: Ukraine and nine European countries launched a coalition to protect Europe from ballistic missiles, drawing on Kyiv’s wartime experience. Follow DW for more.

properties.titulo_evento: Renewed US-Iran war is hitting Gulf countries hard
properties.descricao: After US strikes on Iran, Iran has targeted US allies in the Middle East. Even if Iran isn't targeting the governments or populations of its neighbors, Gulf countries have much to lose as fighting escalates.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela: Almost 4,500 killed in quake, many more missing
properties.descricao: As the official death toll from the devastating earthquakes which struck northern Venezuela last month continues to rise, authorities are planning temporary housing to shelter thousands of people left homeless.

properties.titulo_evento: France opens terror probe after gun found in Jewish suburb
properties.descricao: Police said they found a "military-grade weapon" during the search of a suspicious car parked in a Paris neighborhood with a large Jewish population.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany's Ruhr Valley: Cities on brink of financial collapse
properties.descricao: With tax revenues down and social spending up, more and more cities and towns in the Ruhrgebiet are struggling. Oberhausen is particularly deep in the red.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump notifies Congress of new war against Iran
properties.descricao: President Donald Trump's notification that the U.S. is again at war with Iran gives the administration another 60-day clock for military action.

properties.descricao: The U.K. government is laying rules for 16 and 17 year-olds to run alongside its social media ban for under-16s.

properties.descricao: It marks the first time the U.K. has explicitly written drug patent rules into a free trade agreement.

properties.descricao: For decades, OPEC influenced the market by how much oil it produced. But China, the largest importer, is demonstrating its remarkable power over prices.
